## Part

Which Part does this check belong to? (e.g., Part I — Application Security)

## Section

Which existing section does this fit in? Or propose a new section.

## Proposed Check

Write the check in fortress format:

- [ ] **Check title** — Description of what to verify and why.

## Code Example (if applicable)

```php
// Show the correct pattern
```

## Justification

Would this have prevented a real bug, security vulnerability, or production incident? Explain.
